## What's Changed
* fix: change license file extension from .md to .txt by @codayon in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2817
* Update ko.json by @alexkoala in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2818
* Update ar.json by @jermanuts in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2826
* Update nl.json by @ojppe in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2815
* Update ja.json by @bluefly000 in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2804
* Add workflow to validate translation JSON by @headquarter8302 in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2767
* Added support for apk4free by @divinezmuz in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2812
* Improve farsroid.com handling logic by @facaikotei in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2787
* Improvement and correction of several translations (fr.json) by @Kevinr99089 in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2802
* Updated native plugins by @re7gog in https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium/pull/2739

## New Contributors

apps.changeLog:
• OSM map data as of March 10, Wikipedia as of March 1
• More detailed elevation isolines for Chinese provinces
• Added rows of trees, leather shops and shops selling religious goods
• Added support for conditional speed limits
• Split Tanzania into smaller regions
• Improved display of business opening hours
• Fixed several crashes
• Improved app and country names translations
• Added public transport stop platforms without nearby bus stops
…more at omaps.org/news

See [a detailed announce](https://organicmaps.app/news/) on our website when app updates are published in all stores.
You can get automatic app updates from GitHub [using Obtainium](https://github.com/organicmaps/organicmaps/wiki/Installing-Organic-Maps-from-GitHub-using-Obtainium).

apps.author: MaintainTeam
apps.name: Hypatia
apps.changeLog:
In this release we did some major updates to the database handling in the app, including upgrading the architecture, adding easier database source switching and better error handling.

## Features
- Added the ability to switch database sources between our Codeberg source, a GitHub mirror and a high-quality third-party database.
- Improved the error messages when downloading and validating databases.

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed a NullPointerException when using link scanning.
- Stopped the app from opening up on boot to show you an error message
- Switched to using the GitHub mirror by default for database updates, as the Codeberg server has been unreliable.

## Development Updates
- Refactored the entire database loading code, removing many potential bugs and bringing the codebase closer to modern Android.
- Updated our build scripts to use version catalogs.
- Migrated most remaining Java code to idiomatic Kotlin.
- Updated various dependencies.
- Updated translations.

## Database Updates
- Added the targeted threats database (https://github.com/MaintainTeam/HypatiaDatabases/commit/589362f45146a3d86be2507e0c5e25d36fb0fc56)
- Added some Indicators of Compromise relating to Covid-19 (https://github.com/MaintainTeam/HypatiaDatabases/commit/1d1a210bae8908802e5912342b59e60cb5b3e54a)

apps.author: tmo1
apps.name: SMS Import / Export
apps.changeLog:
### Changed

 - **Breaking:** Apply message filtering to wipe operations ([issue #237](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/237))
 
### Added

 - Add count messages operation ([issue #237](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/237))
 
### Fixed

 - Don't insert into non-existent MMS address columns upon import ([issue #322](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/322))
 - Cancel any scheduled exports when the `Enable scheduled export` preference is disabled ([issue #326](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/326))
 - Remove `android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE` ([issue #324](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/issues/324))
 - Update Italian translation ([c001e65](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/commit/c001e656f539656d7afac5b85ecbedb3e96b6ead), [ae76174](https://github.com/tmo1/sms-ie/commit/ae7617428457a2e35c1f8d3b68fb25033d552ac1)) (Random)

apps.author: comaps
apps.name: CoMaps
apps.changeLog:
General:
- OpenStreetMap data as of March 21
- Added Czech, Thai, Turkish and Ukrainian Wikipedia articles - by @zyphlar and @pastk https://codeberg.org/comaps/wikiparser/pulls/57
- Support maxspeed definitions for more road types in different countries - by @jeanbaptisteC https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3791
- Display highway shields with longer names - by @matheusgomesms https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3847
- Prevent secondary name from appearing for e.g. streets in multi-language regions - by @yannikbloscheck https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3852

Android:
- Improved input validation in favorites list edit dialog - by @Thoms https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3818
- Improved wheel progress indicators with smoother animation - by @jeanbaptisteC https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3828
- Improved opening hours multiple shifts display - by @DaN0mic https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3635
- Improved visibility of route in landscape navigation - by @jeanbaptisteC https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3840
- Remove weird scrollbars visible for some list elements in language settings - by @jeanbaptisteC https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3884
    
iOS:
- Updated POI info card icons - by @yannikbloscheck https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3805
    
Map:
- Added sports: four square and boules - by @patepelo https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3867 and https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3872

Qt / desktop:
- Support AppImage builds - by @ldcuof https://codeberg.org/comaps/comaps/pulls/3708

apps.author: aj3423
apps.name: SpamBlocker
apps.changeLog:
Fix:
- Groq API preset blocks all texts

Changes:
- Light theme removed, all colors tunable (for color blindness)

Enhancements:
- History records
  - Full screening log 
  - Show a yellow "!" if anything went wrong, e.g. Api query timed out
  - A "Test" button in context menu

- Altitude type (EGM2008) wasn't shown

apps.author: signalapp
apps.name: Signal
apps.changeLog:
Now you can optionally add a member label to describe yourself or your role in a group chat. Set your group member label to "Referee" or "Goalie" in your local rec league soccer chat to help kick things off when new teammates join, then choose a different label with your job title in the company chat. Member labels appear next to your profile name in that group, and group admins can control who can set a label with the "Edit group info" permission.

*For automatic updates, we recommend using [Obtainium](https://community.signalusers.org/t/get-the-latest-android-releases-even-faster-with-obtainium/65274).*

apps.author: soupslurpr

* Removes duplicate Accrescent entry and adds an entry for the new Organic Maps internal application identifier by @hashcatHitman in https://github.com/soupslurpr/AppVerifier/pull/193
* Adds a "Copy Verification Info" button by @hashcatHitman in https://github.com/soupslurpr/AppVerifier/pull/194
* update several database entries by @soupslurpr
* remove deprecated targetSandboxVersion="2" by @soupslurpr in https://github.com/soupslurpr/AppVerifier/commit/40653ff85e42e49b9d0d34576b143dcf4f3326bf
* dependency updates by @soupslurpr
* switch to new versioning scheme by @soupslurpr in https://github.com/soupslurpr/AppVerifier/commit/1fa2b1c3f91e82c8970eee22a8e41e568dba83ce

## New Contributors
